system.description:
Discipline: Dianxue
Skill: Arm Strike against Parry
Type: Normal
Qi: 2

You use your knowledge of meridian points to rapidly tap points from the forearm to inner elbow of your foe, disrupting their equilibrium. On a Success the target is dizzy and takes -1d10 to athletics for 1 hour per Rank of Dianxue. Requirement: Requires 1 Rank in Medicine to use. Cathartic: On a Success the target loses 1 point of Stealth, Evade and Parry per level of Qi. These recover at a rate of 1 per hour. This can also be used to reverse the effects of a Triple Yang Strike.
system.source: Wandering Heroes of Ogre Gate, Chapter 3: Kung Fu Techniques
system.catharticTargetDrains: defense.stealth=1 per Rank of Qi; defense.evade=1 per Rank of Qi; defense.parry=1 per Rank of Qi
system.targetDrainsNote: Normal use gives -1d10 to Athletics for 1 hour per Rank of Dianxue. Cathartic drains Stealth, Evade, and Parry per Qi level; these recover at 1 per hour.
system.requirementNotes: Requires 1 Rank in Medicine to use.
system.catharticEffect: On a Success the target loses 1 point of Stealth, Evade and Parry per level of Qi. These recover at a rate of 1 per hour. This can also be used to reverse the effects of a Triple Yang Strike.
